I'll start with the required warmup checklist to understand the codebase state and context.
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /d/Proton\ Drive/My\ files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web\ Development/system.knowledgebase && git log -3 --oneline</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /d/Proton\ Drive/My\ files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web\ Development/system.knowledgebase && git status</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">ls -la /d/Proton\ Drive/My\ files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web\ Development/system.knowledgebase/tasks/</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="bash">
<parameter name="command">cd /d/Proton\ Drive/My\ files/Documents/Professional/Programming/Web\ Development/system.knowledgebase && find . -type f -name "*.md" | grep -E "(tasks|docs)" | head -20</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Great! I've completed the warmup checklist. Here's the current state:

## Current Status

**Git Status:** Clean main branch - no uncommitted changes
**Recent Commits:**
- 4667a53: UI polish, modal content scaling, calendar unification
- e62465f: Branding update from 'Second Brain' to 'Brain'
- 1403b6a: Logo image source update
- 8c2e6d2: Timer tab and README overhaul
- 78a60c9: Archive completed task documents

**Tasks Directory:** Empty (all completed tasks archived)

**Today's Date:** 2025-11-26

## Codebase Overview
This is the "Neuman Brain Dashboard" - a privacy-first knowledge management system built with:
- **Tech Stack:** React 19, TypeScript 5.9, Vite 7, Zustand 5, Tailwind 3, IndexedDB
- **Philosophy:** Local-first, zero-data-host, E2EE backups, perfect foundation thinking
- **Status:** ~1% complete with solid architectural foundation

## Key Documentation Available
- Development principles and widget guides
- AI provider integration documentation
- Feature roadmap and business model docs
- Tech standards (strict TypeScript, Zustand state, Tailwind styling)

I'm ready to assist! Please provide your requirements or task, and I'll:
1. Explore the codebase thoroughly to understand existing patterns
2. Design a detailed implementation plan
3. Identify critical files and potential challenges
4. Present the plan for your approval before any work begins

What would you like to work on?
